title: Chunk Loaders
description: adds craftable chunk loader blocks to the game
body:
Adds Chunk loaders to the game and keep your farms running when your away.


### How it works

when the block is placed. it will keep surrounding chunks updated, allowing for most farms to run when players are not nearby.

![chunk loader block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b77b8dbc565e4854eb867ccac3322a84c9e20275.png)

Each chunk loader can be upgraded to a higher tier up to a maximum of 5x5 chunk radius and to upgrade them, we right-click the block with upgrade kits


### Crafting recipes

![crafting recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8e416d91d8ad502d240719f6639df6123ecbfea.png)



### How to install datapack and resourcepack


the datapack also acts as a resourcepack.

For datapack inside the game, select your world and select "Edit", then "Open World Folder". Look for the datapacks folder and then copy paste Chunk Loader zip file inside.



For resource pack inside the game goto "Options", "Resource Packs", and then "Open Pack folder". Once there copy and paste the Chunk loader zip file inside the folder.
